overall.description: A first-person perspective from inside a flying vehicle navigating through a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk. The footage showcases towering glass skyscrapers with warm interior lighting and neon advertisements, transitioning from open aerial corridors to narrow passages between buildings. This is clearly game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 with cinematic visual quality and atmospheric haze.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a flying vehicle traversing an open aerial corridor through a futuristic city at dusk. A second flying car is visible in the upper right distance, while towering glass skyscrapers with warm interior lighting dominate the skyline. Holographic billboards glow on the left side as the vehicle maintains steady forward flight.

vehicle begins gradual descent toward building rooftops

illuminated corporate signage glowing on building rooftop

segments.scene_description: As the flying car exits the frame, the scene opens up to reveal a large moon in the dusky sky. The vehicle continues forward while gradually descending, bringing a curved glass tower and parking garage into closer view. Neon rooftop signs glow on the right as the camera approaches building level.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching high-rise buildings and parking structures

events.description: transitioning from open air to close proximity with building rooftops
passing close to building edge causing temporary partial obstruction of view

agents.ego_description: navigating closer to building facades and parking structures at lower altitude

entered.detail: building section with large illuminated glass windows showing interior
close-up view of concrete building exterior with small rectangular windows

segments.scene_description: The vehicle descends closer to the buildings, transitioning from open sky to semi-enclosed spaces near rooftops. A parking garage dominates the center view while concrete and glass building facades pass by closely on either side. The moon and distant signs disappear behind as the camera focuses on nearby architectural details.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow aerial corridor between high-rise buildings

events.description: entering narrow corridor between closely spaced skyscrapers
flying extremely close to building walls on both sides

agents.ego_description: carefully navigating through tight spaces between skyscrapers with walls passing by closely

entered.detail: green industrial ventilation equipment and ductwork on building exterior
close concrete building wall with illuminated windows passing by on left
glass and steel building facade passing by closely on right

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle entering a narrow corridor between towering skyscrapers, with building walls passing by extremely close on both sides. Green ventilation shafts and industrial equipment are visible on the left, while illuminated glass facades slide past on the right. The sky is mostly blocked by the surrounding architecture as the vehicle continues through the tight urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person flight through a futuristic cityscape at dusk, transitioning from an open aerial corridor to a lower-altitude approach toward towering architecture. It begins by gliding past glass skyscrapers with warm interior lighting and glowing holographic billboards, while another flying vehicle drifts in the distant upper right. As the other car exits the frame, the view expands to reveal a large moon hanging in the dusky sky. The camera then gradually descends, shifting the perspective from the open skyline toward the detailed curves of a glass tower and a parking garage. The scene finally closes in on the building level, where neon rooftop signs glow brightly on the right as the vehicle nears the structures.

The shot follows a continuous descent from the open sky into the claustrophobic depths of a dense urban canyon. It begins as the vehicle drops closer to the rooftops, moving from the vast horizon toward a central parking garage while the moon and distant signs vanish behind towering concrete and glass facades. As the vehicle descends further, the surrounding architecture tightens, shifting the focus from broad building exteriors to the intricate details of nearby walls. The scene then narrows into a tight corridor where the sky is almost entirely blocked by skyscrapers, with green ventilation shafts and industrial equipment sliding past on the left. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into this architectural chasm, flanked by illuminated glass facades that blur past in the confined space.
